creator: sheldonh@starjuice.net
text:
On Wed, 05 Sep 2001 03:06:34 +0900, "Akinori MUSHA" wrote:

> I suppose they should be added prior to (or along with) exim then.

I agree.  I think the major MTAs should be on the first CD, along with
Apache (and probably apache-ssl too).

> Aren't these excessive?  OpenLDAP, MySQL and PostgreSQL are not
> included in the CD-ROM #1 list currently.  They sound much like
> optional.

You're right.  How silly of me. Only exim and exim-monitor should appear
on the first CDROM.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
